title: Self-improving AI, Opus 4.8, Nvidia bangers, game-ready 3D models, juggling robots: AI NEWS
summary: A YouTube news roundup covering recent AI model releases including Claude Opus 4.8, Step 3.7 Flash, and MiniCPM5 alongside research projects spanning 3D generation, vision, robotics, and automated scientific discovery. The episode highlights work from Anthropic, StepFun, OpenBMB, and various research labs.
